chapter_title.ar: بَابُ صَيْدِ الْحَرَمِ وَ مَا تَجِبُ فِيهِ الْكَفَّارَةُ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 21 – Hunt of the Al-Harram and what expiation is Obligated with regards to it

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/97)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (7/97)
text: أَخْبَرَنِي حَمْزَةُ بْنُ الْيَسَعَ قَالَ سَأَلْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) عَنِ الْفَهْدِ يُشْتَرَى بِمِنًى وَ يُخْرَجُ بِهِ مِنَ الْحَرَمِ فَقَالَ كُلُّ مَا أُدْخِلَ الْحَرَمَ مِنَ السَّبُعِ مَأْسُوراً فَعَلَيْكَ إِخْرَاجُهُ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Sahl Bin Ziyad and Ahmad Bin Muhammad, altogether, from Ibn Abu Nasr who said,

‘Hamza Bin Al-Yas’a informed me saying, ‘I asked Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> about the leopard someone bought in Mina, and he went out with it from Al-Harram. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Everything from the predatory wild animal which enter the الْحَرَمِ in captivity, so upon you is exiting it’.
en.sarwar: 28. A number of our people have narrated from Sahl ibn Ziyad and Ahmad ibn Muhammad all from ibn abu Nasr who has said the following: “Hamzah ibn al-Yasa’ said to me that I once asked abu ’Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the tiger that is purchased in Mina and then is taken out of al-Haram (the sacred area). He (the Imam) said, ’Everything of beasts that are brought in al-Haram (the sacred area) in captivity you must take out of al-Haram (the sacred area).”’
